conversation.content:
Audit ALL 3 customers (CUST-8842, CUST-2244, CUST-5501): get each profile, get each order history, look up every non-returned order's details, check inventory for every item across all those orders, flag any out-of-stock items, and send a per-customer summary email with their audit results.
Today's date is 2026-03-10.
I'll execute a comprehensive audit of all three customers. Let me gather all the data and perform the complete analysis in one script.

input.code:
# Comprehensive audit for all 3 customers
customer_ids = ['CUST-8842', 'CUST-2244', 'CUST-5501']

# Step 1: Get all customer profiles and order histories
customer_data = {}
for cust_id in customer_ids:
    profile = tool('get_customer', customer_id=cust_id)
    order_history = tool('get_order_history', customer_id=cust_id)
    customer_data[cust_id] = {
        'profile': profile,
        'order_history': order_history
    }

# Step 2: Look up details for all non-returned orders
all_skus = []
order_details_map = {}

for cust_id in customer_ids:
    orders = customer_data[cust_id]['order_history']['orders']
    for order in orders:
        # Skip returned orders
        if order['status'].lower() != 'returned':
            order_detail = tool('lookup_order', order_id=order['id'])
            order_details_map[order['id']] = order_detail
            # Collect all SKUs from this order
            for item in order_detail['items']:
                all_skus.append(item['sku'])

# Step 3: Check inventory for all SKUs
inventory_result = tool('check_inventory', sku_list=all_skus)
inventory_by_sku = {}
for item in inventory_result['items']:
    inventory_by_sku[item['sku']] = item

# Step 4: Build audit results per customer
audit_results = {}

for cust_id in customer_ids:
    profile = customer_data[cust_id]['profile']
    orders = customer_data[cust_id]['order_history']['orders']
    
    out_of_stock_items = []
    order_summary = []
    total_orders = len(orders)
    non_returned_orders = 0
    
    for order in orders:
        if order['status'].lower() != 'returned':
            non_returned_orders += 1
            order_detail = order_details_map[order['id']]
            
            order_items_status = []
            for item in order_detail['items']:
                sku = item['sku']
                inv = inventory_by_sku.get(sku, {})
                available = inv.get('available', 0)
                
                item_status = {
                    'name': item['name'],
                    'sku': sku,
                    'price': item['price'],
                    'available': available,
                    'in_stock': available > 0
                }
                order_items_status.append(item_status)
                
                if available == 0:
                    out_of_stock_items.append({
                        'order_id': order['id'],
                        'item_name': item['name'],
                        'sku': sku,
                        'price': item['price'],
                        'warehouse': inv.get('warehouse', 'Unknown'),
                        'restock_date': inv.get('restock_date', 'Unknown')
                    })
            
            order_summary.append({
                'order_id': order['id'],
                'date': order['date'],
                'status': order['status'],
                'total': order['total'],
                'items': order_items_status
            })
    
    audit_results[cust_id] = {
        'customer_name': profile['name'],
        'email': profile['email'],
        'tier': profile['tier'],
        'loyalty_points': profile['loyalty_points'],
        'account_status': profile['account_status'],
        'total_orders': total_orders,
        'non_returned_orders': non_returned_orders,
        'returned_orders': total_orders - non_returned_orders,
        'out_of_stock_items': out_of_stock_items,
        'order_summary': order_summary
    }

# Step 5: Send summary emails to each customer
email_results = []

for cust_id in customer_ids:
    audit = audit_results[cust_id]
    
    # Build email body
    email_body = f"""Dear {audit['customer_name']},

This is your account audit summary as of 2026-03-10.

ACCOUNT INFORMATION:
- Membership Tier: {audit['tier']}
- Loyalty Points: {audit['loyalty_points']}
- Account Status: {audit['account_status']}

ORDER SUMMARY:
- Total Orders: {audit['total_orders']}
- Non-Returned Orders: {audit['non_returned_orders']}
- Returned Orders: {audit['returned_orders']}

"""
    
    if audit['out_of_stock_items']:
        email_body += f"⚠️ OUT-OF-STOCK ITEMS ALERT ({len(audit['out_of_stock_items'])} items):\n"
        for item in audit['out_of_stock_items']:
            email_body += f"\n  • {item['item_name']} (SKU: {item['sku']})\n"
            email_body += f"    Order: {item['order_id']}\n"
            email_body += f"    Price: ${item['price']}\n"
            email_body += f"    Restock Date: {item['restock_date']}\n"
    else:
        email_body += "✓ All items in your orders are currently in stock.\n"
    
    email_body += f"""

DETAILED ORDER BREAKDOWN:
"""
    
    for order in audit['order_summary']:
        email_body += f"\nOrder {order['order_id']} ({order['date']}) - Status: {order['status']} - Total: ${order['total']}\n"
        for item in order['items']:
            stock_status = "✓ In Stock" if item['in_stock'] else "✗ Out of Stock"
            email_body += f"  - {item['name']} (SKU: {item['sku']}) - ${item['price']} - {stock_status}\n"
    
    email_body += """

If you have any questions about this audit, please contact our support team.

Best regards,
Customer Audit Team"""
    
    # Send email
    email_result = tool('send_notification', 
                       channel='email',
                       recipient=audit['email'],
                       subject=f'Account Audit Summary - {cust_id}',
                       body=email_body)
    
    email_results.append({
        'customer_id': cust_id,
        'email': audit['email'],
        'notification_id': email_result['notification_id'],
        'sent_at': email_result['sent_at'],
        'status': email_result['status']
    })

# Return comprehensive audit summary
{
    'audit_date': '2026-03-10',
    'customers_audited': len(customer_ids),
    'audit_results': audit_results,
    'emails_sent': email_results,
    'total_out_of_stock_items': sum(len(audit['out_of_stock_items']) for audit in audit_results.values())
}
